ShaderNodePreset.Description: Flame companion for CorridorKey FG and Matte passes. Assemble, shape, despill, and QC the generated key.
ShaderNodePreset.Name: Greg Corridor Key

Uniform.Tooltip: Choose the output view.
Uniform.Name: output_mode

Uniform.Tooltip: Channel to read from the CorridorKey Matte input.
Uniform.Name: matte_channel

Uniform.Tooltip: Invert the selected matte channel.
Uniform.Name: invert_matte

Uniform.Tooltip: Lift the matte black point.
Uniform.Name: matte_black

Uniform.Tooltip: Set the matte white point.
Uniform.Name: matte_white

Uniform.Tooltip: Gamma-shape the matte after black/white point adjustment.
Uniform.Name: matte_gamma

Uniform.Tooltip: Soften the matte in pixels.
Uniform.Name: matte_blur

Uniform.Tooltip: Positive values choke the matte; negative values grow it.
Uniform.Name: matte_choke

Uniform.Tooltip: Reduce green spill using the original plate input as a guide.
Uniform.Name: despill_strength

Uniform.Tooltip: Restore some magenta/blue edge energy after despill.
Uniform.Name: edge_restore

Uniform.Tooltip: Convert CorridorKey FG from display/sRGB gamma to linear before combining.
Uniform.Name: fg_srgb_to_linear

Uniform.Tooltip: When Output Mode is RGBA Key, output premultiplied RGB instead of straight RGB.
Uniform.Name: premultiply_output

Uniform.Tooltip: Blend premultiplied foreground over the Background input in Composite mode.
Uniform.Name: bg_mix

Uniform.Tooltip: Blend between the unprocessed FG input and this Matchbox result.
Uniform.Name: mix_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Move the keyed foreground horizontally in result pixels. Positive values move right.
Uniform.Name: transform_x

Uniform.Tooltip: Move the keyed foreground vertically in result pixels. Positive values move up.
Uniform.Name: transform_y

Uniform.Tooltip: Scale the keyed foreground around the frame center before compositing.
Uniform.Name: transform_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: CorridorKey FG pass, preferably the straight foreground color output.
Uniform.Name: fg_input

Uniform.Tooltip: CorridorKey Matte pass.
Uniform.Name: matte_input

Uniform.Tooltip: Optional background for Composite mode.
Uniform.Name: bg_input

Uniform.Tooltip: Original green-screen plate, used only as a despill guide.
Uniform.Name: plate_input
